utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each of the first three (health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage) is fully specified with plan name, costs (monthly and annual), and coverage details, satisfying the requirement for 'with costs'. The additional_services entry lists enhancement services with associated context (though not individual costs, it is still present and reasonably descriptive). The total_budget item includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all five required items are included and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main components: health_coverage (Consolidated Premium Insurance Package Proposal30), property_coverage (Consolidated Premium Insurance Package0), and travel_coverage (EliteCare Premium Plan (Mental Health)5). The first two ('Consolidated Premium Insurance Package...') names do not directly match any ground-truth items, so they must be mapped to the closest available reference in the ground-truth ratings. The health_coverage package includes both physical and mental coverage, wellness programs, and telemedicine. The wellness programs and telemedicine correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3) and 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8) under health_enhancement_services. The property_coverage plan name includes 'Premium' and covers luxury items — this aligns most closely with 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (rating 6) in the property_protection section. The travel_coverage explicitly names 'EliteCare Premium Plan (Mental Health)5', which best aligns with 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under mental_health (rating 3). Therefore, the mapping is as follows: health coverage relates to 'Wellness Programs' and 'Telemedicine Services', property coverage relates to 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage', and travel coverage relates to 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under mental health.
